contents.text: The King is the focal point of your team in classic mode. He resides in your team's base in a special throne room. Due to his age, he cannot leave his throne through traditional means.

The king fights back against unsuspecting enemies by dealing massive melee damage and knockback. He also has a pair of royal guards that chase and attack enemies within the throne room. Once slain, these guards take 2 minutes to respawn.

In the menu, you'll notice that you can activate your king through the King Activation tool. This tool costs Siege Bucks, but allows the king to move for 5 seconds. Continuous purchases increase the timer by 5 seconds.
Each team's king has their health displayed at the top of the screen as a health bar. Use this to strategize about attacking the opponent versus defending your own king.
If a match has been going on for over 15 minutes, kings start to lose 1 HP per second. This can eliminate your king, so be careful!
